lines.text: Rover, look! So beautiful! The entire Violet Banyan is illuminated!
lines.quest_name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest

lines.text: But why the artificial moons... Judging by the story in that nursery rhyme and the words on the moons, someone must have lived here long ago!
lines.quest_name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest

lines.text: I've read about a type of creature called "Suan'ni" that once lived this place. But unfortunately, they're nowhere to be found now.
lines.quest_name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest

lines.text: Theoretically, they don't speak human languages. With the limited info we have, who knows if it's true?
lines.quest_name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest

lines.text: Perhaps those Suan'nis hung these moons.
lines.quest_name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest

lines.text: Having lived in this dark place for so long, they may have yearned for light, even if it's just artificial moonlight.
lines.quest_name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest

lines.text: Anyway, this is just a guess. There are still many mysteries in the Dim Forest waiting for us to unveil.
lines.quest_name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest

lines.text: Hoohoo's curious too! We'll keep exploring and see if we find more clues.
lines.quest_name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest

lines.text: Thank you so much for helping us, Rover! Hope to see you again soon!
lines.quest_name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest
